no: BG1 NPC Project Skips installing romances except those with BG2 continuations. Banters are fine, but the romances are of uneven quality; Shar-Teel's is particularly atrocious I've choosen the standard timer options for brevity, you can go and pick the faster or slower ones The Music Pack - installed after the BG1 NPC Project - adds appropriate music to some unvoiced dialog lines. Install the player-initiated dialog component of BG1 NPC Project after Mazzy MegaMod.. mod_installer: Romance components each recompile ~530 dialogue files (~8 min per component). Full install with all romances takes ~1-2 hours

conflicts.reason: Both rewrite Sarevok's Diary item (SCRL3F.ITM). Install order dependent — last installed wins for diary text. BG1NPC diary component is #130/#241, not #10
Both provide the same 'send NPCs to inn' functionality; install one or the other
conflicts.myComps: #90 NPCs can be sent to wait in an inn
conflicts.theirComps: #1075 Send BioWare NPCs to an Inn

conflicts.reason: Choose one "NPCs can be sent to wait in an inn"
conflicts.myComps: #90 NPCs can be sent to wait in an inn

conflicts.reason: Choose one Shadows of Amn Banter Accelerator
Choose one banter timing system. BG1NPC cn:110-114 and Banter Accelerator both set banter timing globals. Using both causes unpredictable timing. Removed BG1NPC cn:110 .
conflicts.source: Both set banter timing globals; removed BG1NPC cn:110

conflicts.reason: Both can set NPC portrait filenames. EET Tweaks appearance options let user choose BG1/BG2/SoD portraits. BG1NPC patches for consistency. Install BG1NPC before EET Tweaks.
Generally compatible. Standard install order: Dark Horizons first, BG1 NPC Project after. Both add BG1 content but don't directly conflict.
Generally compatible. Standard install order: Dark Horizons first, BG1 NPC Project after. Both add BG1 content but don't directly conflict.
Both modify portraits for Kivan, Coran, non-joinable NPCs. Last installed wins

conflicts.reason: BG1UB tp2 uses FORBID_FILE for BG1NPC Phase 2. These components are mutually exclusive. Moot on EET (cn:4,6,7 blocked on BGEE)
conflicts.theirComps: #4 Kagain Caravan #6 Kivan and Tazok #7 Branwen and Tranzig

conflicts.reason: BG1UB tp2 uses FORBID_FILE for BG1NPC Core. Moot on EET (cn:5 blocked on BGEE)
Both modify Coran and non-joinable NPC portraits. Last installed wins

BG1NPC EXTEND_TOPs CENTEOL.BCS, changing its structure so VaultEET's REPLACE_BCS_BLOCK for ocenteol-ee.baf no longer matches. VaultEET's Centeol dialog trigger patch is silently skipped. Non-fatal — vault quest still works.
Multiple Adventure Pack components have FORBID_COMPONENT on bg1npc cn:10. Adventure Pack must install BEFORE BG1 NPC Project.

dependencies.reason: Drizzt Saga with Dynaheir's BG1NPC Quest needs delayed Drizzt

a: Blucher, Kish, Andyr, Domi, cmorgan, AstroBryGuy
sum: Massively expands companion dialogue, banter, and romance options for all original BG1 NPCs. Adds hundreds of new conversations and inter-party interactions.

avoid: Can bloat BG1 with too much dialog if combined with every dialog mod
rec.tip: The definitive BG1 dialog expansion. Most BG1 NPC mods are designed to work alongside it.

co.tp2n: The BG1 NPC Project: Kivan's "Kivan and Deheriana Companions" portrait
co.no: INSTALL FAILURE Copies portrait BMP to user Documents EET portraits folder (C:\Users\...\Documents\Baldur's Gate - Enhanced Edition Trilogy\portraits\). WeiDU backup path gets mangled to C..Users...Documents... and rollback fails with 'Bad file descriptor'. Cannot work in automated installs. Do NOT include s — install manually after mod stack is complete.
